name: Q-10 --dry-run reports planned parameters and exits zero without reading the log per §2.14
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/velocity-report.sh" --dry-run --baseline-days 30 --recent-days 7 2>err.txt && grep -q 'dry_run=true' err.txt && grep -q 'baseline_days=30' err.txt && echo skipped 1>&2
